description: Configure the Nginx service in '/home/ga/ssl-task/' to serve traffic over HTTPS on port 443 using the provided self-signed certificates ('server.crt' and 'server.key') located in '/home/ga/ssl-task/certs/'. The website should be accessible at https://localhost. You may ignore browser security warnings regarding the self-signed certificate.

metadata.expected_text: Welcome to the Secure Local Site
